differential_diagnoses: Psychogenic nonepileptic seizures (PNES) co-morbid with epilepsy
next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for autoimmune/paraneoplastic encephalitis antibody panel (specifically LGI1, CASPR2, and NMDA)
Obtain serum electrolytes, ammonia, and drug levels (carbamazepine, lacosamide, topiramate) to assess for toxicity
Review EEG telemetry data for subtle interictal periodic discharges or electrographic status
Obtain detailed collateral psychiatric and social history to rule out subacute behavioral changes
Perform formal autoimmune screening including voltage-gated potassium channel complex antibodies
Audit and simplify the current antiseizure medication regimen to minimize encephalopathic contribution
Initiate or optimize psychiatric consultation for management of psychosis while avoiding seizure threshold-lowering agents
